intent_head: 处理收件箱中的下一条消息。

details: 处理收件箱中的下一条消息。

task_text: 处理收件箱中的下一条消息。

next_step.current_state: Starting mandatory identity bootstrap before inbox processing.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Locate inbox root and next message
next_step.observation: No workspace contents have been loaded yet in this run.

next_step.current_state: Tree bootstrap succeeded; root contains AGENTS.MD (uppercase). Need load rulebook then context.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Process requested action across all scoped finance files
next_step.observation: The root tree shows an AGENTS.MD file at / and inbox file 00_inbox/112_next-task.md.

next_step.current_state: Read root rulebook. Must complete bootstrap by loading context before task-specific work.
next_step.observation: Root AGENTS.MD requires inspecting 99_system/ before starting task work and reading nested AGENTS.MD when entering folders.

next_step.current_state: Identity bootstrap complete (tree + AGENTS.MD + context). Now must satisfy root rule to inspect 99_system before task work.
Inspected 99_system tree; next load nested rulebook before reading workflows.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read relevant workflow for processing next inbox item
next_step.observation: 99_system contains workflows and schemas plus its own AGENTS.MD.

next_step.current_state: Loaded system lane guidance; need specific workflow docs under 99_system/workflows for inbox processing.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Process all required files then delete inbox item
next_step.observation: 99_system/AGENTS.MD states workflows define how to act and schemas define field expectations.

next_step.current_state: Workflow index indicates inbox-processing-v2-update is required for inbox routing tasks; read it next.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Apply requested operations across all scoped files
next_step.observation: 99_system/workflows/AGENTS.MD explicitly requires reading inbox-processing-v2-update.md for inbox processing tasks.

next_step.current_state: Security reactive guidance loaded; still need the concrete inbox-processing workflow and inbox-local rules before acting.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Execute requested processing or report security outcome
next_step.observation: Read inbox-processing-v2-update workflow: if structured-maintenance task completes successfully, inbox item should be removed; if not doable, avoid partial edits.

next_step.current_state: Loaded process-next-inbox workflow. Need folder-specific inbox rules and then read lowest file content.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Process all required files and clean up inbox
next_step.observation: Process-next-inbox-item workflow says to pick lowest filename in 00_inbox, treat as request, verify against canonical lanes, and delete inbox file after successful completion.

next_step.current_state: Inbox lane rules loaded. Next read the target inbox item (lowest visible file 112_next-task.md).
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Identify entity/action and full finance scope
Delete inbox item and report completion
next_step.observation: 00_inbox/AGENTS.MD confirms lowest filename processing and deletion only after full completion.

next_step.current_state: Inbox request asks to locate a specific bill and confirm bank transfer completion. Need canonical finance evidence before deciding if unsupported.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read candidate purchase record for 2026-03-31 EUR 25
Check whether payment-completion evidence exists locally
Report outcome without mutation if confirmation requires external capability
next_step.observation: Inbox item requests the Müller Bürobedarf bill dated 2026-03-31 for EUR 25 and asks for confirmation once bank transfer has completed.

next_step.current_state: Need inspect purchases subfolder rules before reading target bill file.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Assess whether transfer completion can be verified from local records
next_step.observation: Finance lane policy loaded; structured-finance edits require schema-guided preservation, but current request is locate and payment-status confirmation.

next_step.current_state: Ready to verify the specific bill record referenced in inbox.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Read target purchase file for 2026-03-31 EUR 25
Determine if bank-transfer confirmation is supported locally
Issue final outcome and handle inbox cleanup only if fully completed
next_step.observation: Purchases lane rules emphasize trust boundaries and reviewable financial changes; no extra workflow requirement for simple lookup.

next_step.current_state: Target bill file was found and read; still need evidence for whether bank transfer completion is recorded locally.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Search workspace for this bill identifier
Search for transfer/payment-completed signals tied to this bill
If no local confirmation mechanism exists, report unsupported
Do not mutate inbox on unsupported outcome
next_step.observation: Read purchase record confirming Müller Bürobedarf bill dated 2026-03-31 with total EUR 25.

next_step.current_state: Only one local record references this bill ID; no linked payment record found yet.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Search for vendor name across workspace
Search for payment-status keywords tied to this bill
Conclude outcome based on available evidence
Report to user with grounded refs
next_step.observation: Search for bill.school_helper_label_tape returned exactly one match, in the purchase record itself.

next_step.current_state: Vendor search shows only inbox request and bill record; still need to verify whether any local payment-completion record exists.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Search for generic payment completion markers
Determine if confirming completion requires external systems
next_step.observation: Search for Müller Bürobedarf found only the inbox request and the matching purchase bill file.

next_step.current_state: No transfer references beyond inbox request; checking if local finance records track payment status fields.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Assess whether this specific bill has such status
Finalize with unsupported if confirmation needs external bank check
next_step.observation: Searching for 'bank transfer' returned only the inbox instruction and no separate transfer record.

next_step.current_state: Evidence gathered: located the requested bill, but no local payment/transfer completion record exists; confirming transfer completion would require external banking capability not available in sandbox.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Report unsupported outcome with located bill details
next_step.observation: Searches found no local payment-status or bank-transfer completion data for the bill beyond the inbox request itself.

function.message: 已处理下一条收件箱请求：已定位到账单 `50_finance/purchases/2026_03_31__eur_000025__bill__school_helper_label_tape.md`（2026-03-31，EUR 25，Müller Bürobedarf）。但当前工作区没有任何可用于确认“银行转账已完成”的本地记录，因此无法完成该确认通知。
function.rulebook_notes: 按能力边界规则，涉及确认银行转账状态这类外部支付状态检查，若无本地实现应返回 OUTCOME_NONE_UNSUPPORTED，且不做替代性伪操作。
function.outcome_justification: `00_inbox/112_next-task.md` 要求“转账完成后告知”；已在 `50_finance/purchases/2026_03_31__eur_000025__bill__school_helper_label_tape.md` 找到目标账单，但未发现任何本地支付完成记录，确认转账完成需要沙箱外部银行/支付系统能力。
